definitions.description: Work with your data in Azure AI Search Vector Store

builderHint.searchHint: Pick mode by where data flows: `insert` upserts documents into the store on the main flow; `load` runs a one-shot similarity search on the main flow; `retrieve-as-tool` is the canonical RAG mode — plug into an AI Agent's `subnodes.tools`; `retrieve` exposes the store as a subnode for another node's `subnodes.vectorStore`; `update` updates a single document by ID.

properties.displayName: Tip: Get a feel for vector stores in n8n with our
properties.name: ragStarterCallout

options.name: Get Many
options.description: Get many ranked documents from vector store for query
options.action: Get ranked documents from vector store

options.name: Retrieve Documents (As Vector Store for Chain/Tool)
options.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as vector store with AI nodes
options.action: Retrieve documents for Chain/Tool as Vector Store

options.name: Retrieve Documents (As Tool for AI Agent)
options.description: Retrieve documents from vector store to be used as tool with AI nodes
options.action: Retrieve documents for AI Agent as Tool

options.name: Update Documents
options.description: Update documents in vector store by ID

properties.displayName: This node must be connected to a vector store retriever. Insert one
properties.name: notice
toolDescription
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often
properties.placeholder: e.g. Work with your data in Azure AI Search Vector Store

properties.name: indexName
properties.description: The name of the Azure AI Search index. Will be created automatically if it does not exist.

properties.name: embeddingBatchSize
properties.description: Number of documents to embed in a single batch

options.name: clearIndex
options.description: Whether to delete and recreate the index before inserting new data. Warning: This will reset any custom index configuration (semantic ranking, analyzers, etc.) to defaults.

options.name: metadataKeysToInsert
options.description: Comma-separated list of metadata keys to store in Azure AI Search. Leave empty to include all metadata. Azure AI Search stores metadata in an "attributes" array format.

properties.name: prompt
properties.description: Search prompt to retrieve matching documents from the vector store using similarity-based ranking

properties.name: topK
properties.description: Number of top results to fetch from vector store

properties.name: includeDocumentMetadata
properties.description: Whether or not to include document metadata

properties.name: useReranker
properties.description: Whether or not to rerank results

options.name: queryType
options.description: The type of search query to perform

options.name: Semantic Hybrid
options.description: Hybrid search with semantic ranking (requires Basic tier or higher)

options.name: filter
options.description: Filter results using OData syntax. Use metadata/fieldName for metadata fields. Learn more.

options.name: semanticConfiguration
options.description: Name of the semantic configuration for semantic ranking (optional)

options.name: queryType
options.description: The type of search query to perform

options.name: Semantic Hybrid
options.description: Hybrid search with semantic ranking (requires Basic tier or higher)

options.name: filter
options.description: Filter results using OData syntax. Use metadata/fieldName for metadata fields. Learn more.

options.name: semanticConfiguration
options.description: Name of the semantic configuration for semantic ranking (optional)
